promotionalText: Start one 5-minute block, stay on camera, and finish what you started.
description:
Done in 5 helps you turn resistance into one focused 5-minute block.

Pick one task, start the block, and finish clean. Camera accountability can keep the session real while the app is active in the foreground.

Download free and start with a focused block. Done in 5 Pro unlocks unlimited blocks, full history, custom voice lines, and stronger accountability tools.

Features:
- 5-minute focus blocks
- Camera accountability during active sessions
- Build progress from completed blocks
- Custom voice lines and strict reminders
- Full history with Done in 5 Pro
